nasb.text: so I have again purposed in these days to do good to Jerusalem and to the house of Judah. Do not fear!

esv.text: so again have I purposed in these days to bring good to Jerusalem and to the house of Judah; fear not.

cnv.text: 照樣，在這些日子裡，我定意恩待耶路撒冷和猶大家。你們不要懼怕。

ccb.text: 现在我决定赐福给耶路撒冷和犹大家。你们不要惧怕。
